title: Gapple Counter
description:
This texturepack is made by MrOrdenador,
credits to sugi (It's a part of his/her pack)
DONT USE IT IN TESTS
body:
# Gapple Counter ![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44f078eba089a926a60cb6337ceb2334645015c3.png) **Gapple Counter** is a simple texturepack that lets you see how many golden apples (Gapples) your opponent has got in his hand. This texturepack requires either [Optifine](https://optifine.net) or [CIT-Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
# Attention Using this resource pack may result in a ban from most gamemodes (if not every gamemode) of [mctiers.com](https://mctiers.com/) and [subtiers.net](https://subtiers.net/). Make sure to check the **Testing Ruleset** of each tierlist before using it.
